# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

Prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: vpc-three-tier-app
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    name: vpc-three-tier-app
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL

- name: subnet-web-tier
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    name: subnet-web-tier
    network: $(ref.vpc-three-tier-app.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: 10.1.0.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      flowSampling: 1.0
      aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

- name: subnet-app-tier
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    name: subnet-app-tier
    network: $(ref.vpc-three-tier-app.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: 10.2.0.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      flowSampling: 1.0
      aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

- name: subnet-db-tier
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    name: subnet-db-tier
    network: $(ref.vpc-three-tier-app.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: 10.3.0.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      flowSampling: 1.0
      aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

# Firewall: Allow HTTP/HTTPS to web tier only from external
- name: fw-allow-web-ingress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: fw-allow-web-ingress
    network: $(ref.vpc-three-tier-app.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
    targetTags:
      - web-tier
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "80"
          - "443"
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# Firewall: Allow app tier traffic only from web tier
- name: fw-allow-web-to-app
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: fw-allow-web-to-app
    network: $(ref.vpc-three-tier-app.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceTags:
      - web-tier
    targetTags:
      - app-tier
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "8080"
          - "8443"
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# Firewall: Allow db tier traffic only from app tier
- name: fw-allow-app-to-db
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: fw-allow-app-to-db
    network: $(ref.vpc-three-tier-app.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceTags:
      - app-tier
    targetTags:
      - db-tier
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "3306"
          - "5432"
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# Deny all other ingress by default (explicit deny-all rule)
- name: fw-deny-all-ingress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: fw-deny-all-ingress
    network: $(ref.vpc-three-tier-app.selfLink)
    priority: 65534
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
    denied:
      - IPProtocol: all
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# Deny all egress by default
- name: fw-deny-all-egress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: fw-deny-all-egress
    network: $(ref.vpc-three-tier-app.selfLink)
    priority: 65534
    direction: EGRESS
    destinationRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
    denied:
      - IPProtocol: all
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# Allow egress from web tier to app tier only
- name: fw-allow-web-to-app-egress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: fw-allow-web-to-app-egress
    network: $(ref.vpc-three-tier-app.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: EGRESS
    destinationRanges:
      - "10.2.0.0/24"
    targetTags:
      - web-tier
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "8080"
          - "8443"
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# Allow egress from app tier to db tier only
- name: fw-allow-app-to-db-egress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: fw-allow-app-to-db-egress
    network: $(ref.vpc-three-tier-app.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: EGRESS
    destinationRanges:
      - "10.3.0.0/24"
    targetTags:
      - app-tier
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "3306"
          - "5432"
    logConfig:
      enable: true

# Allow egress to Google APIs via Private Google Access
- name: fw-allow-google-apis-egress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    name: fw-allow-google-apis-egress
    network: $(ref.vpc-three-tier-app.selfLink)
    priority: 900
    direction: EGRESS
    destinationRanges:
      - "199.36.153.8/30"
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "443"
    logConfig:
      enable: true

outputs:
- name: networkSelfLink
  value: $(ref.vpc-three-tier-app.selfLink)
- name: webSubnetSelfLink
  value: $(ref.subnet-web-tier.selfLink)
- name: appSubnetSelfLink
  value: $(ref.subnet-app-tier.selfLink)
- name: dbSubnetSelfLink
  value: $(ref.subnet-db-tier.selfLink)
